brollCues.description: dim room, two figures under a blanket, warm amber lamp glow, no faces visible — just warmth
two people sitting beside a small bonfire at night, warm orange glow, relaxed posture, quiet
older woman laughing with a younger woman at a kitchen table, warm evening interior, genuine ease between them
close-up, two people side by side in candlelight, one resting their head on the other's shoulder, soft and still
slow fade — hands intertwined on a warm surface, soft light, no faces
